title: Rootless podman-systemd.unit with PublishPort=1093:69/udp not producing a pasta process with corresponding -u flag

comments.body:
This works as expected your cli is not comparable to the quadlet definition. Simply check the genered service file for the full podman run command.

Because you specify `--network pxe` it will not use pasta for port forwarding as custom networks work entirely different than the plain pasta or slirp4netns mode.
https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/22943#discussioncomment-9795883
